findings: The existing 3006 server was serving stale code and returned 403 for preview reconciliation.
A fresh server on 3010 exposed the new preview bank-account endpoint correctly.
fixesApplied: Started a fresh Next.js dev server on port 3010 and used it for all remaining runtime cycles.

findings: Six targeted import scenarios passed: good file, missing columns, wrong formats, duplicates, mixed rows, pasted tabular data.
Evidence runner failed waiting on a transient success notice after import.
fixesApplied: Updated the evidence runner to wait for durable post-import register state using the imported reference instead of a narrow success-text selector.

findings: Evidence runner failed reopening the import panel because the UI state after commit was not always tied to the expected toolbar button label.
fixesApplied: Changed the evidence runner to re-enter the import panel through the route deep link ?account=10&import=1 instead of relying on post-import button text.

findings: Browser evidence completed and generated all required import screenshots plus import-proof-report.json.
Frontend lint and production build passed.
Targeted backend accounting and Phase 1 workflow suites passed.
